about.title: The soul of a café, the comfort of a restaurant.
about.body: Tucked into the Palmiers district of Casablanca, Koffee Kuento takes its coffee as seriously as its food. Our regulars keep coming back for the morning latte art, the weekend brunch, or just to settle in somewhere that feels worth staying.
about.box1Desc: Hand-selected beans, precise extraction, latte art made in-house.
about.box2Desc: Prepared fresh each morning from quality ingredients.

aboutPage.title: The soul of a café, the comfort of a restaurant.
aboutPage.p1: Sitting at the corner of Rue Mortada and Rue de Bethléem, in the heart of the Palmiers neighbourhood in Casablanca, Koffee Kuento was built around one idea: a place where specialty coffee and honest home-cooked food share the same space, in a setting that makes you want to stay.
aboutPage.p2: Exposed brick, raw wood, warm light — our industrial-chic space was designed to be your third place. Whether you're working, meeting friends, or just taking a proper lunch break, our team is here from 7:30 am with a well-pulled espresso and a brunch made fresh every morning.
aboutPage.p3b: our customers speak better than we can. Come see for yourself.

ctaBanner2.heading: More than coffee — a place to stay.
ctaBanner2.body: Exposed brick, warm lights, good coffee. The kind of place where an hour turns into three without you noticing. Open daily from 7:30 am.

ctaBanner3.heading: We deliver to your door.
ctaBanner3.body: Can't make it in? Find our full menu on Glovo — fast delivery to your area.

testimonial.titleSuffix: Google reviews — what our customers say

gallery.title: Our space, our dishes
gallery.desc: A glimpse of the space, the coffees and the plates — as they are at Koffee Kuento.

footer.tagline: Specialty coffee & homemade brunch in Palmiers, Casablanca. Open daily from 7:30 am.
